title: Technically Magical - Big Globe Edition
body:
Explore a vast world thanks to the Big Globe Mod! Harvest various crops and make wonderful meals thanks to Farmer's Delight Mod! Gear up with Immersive Armors, Mythic Metals, Simply Swords, and Simply More! Upgrade your tried and true tools with Mythic Upgrades! Build wonderful contraptions to farm or process for you with the Oritech Mod! Explore the skies themselves with the Immersive Aircraft mod! Explore the mysteries of the world with the Spectrum Mod! Hoard more resources in style with Refined Storage! This is a world filled with possibilities and experiences around every corner! This modpack is very similar to Technically Magical, with minor modifications to make it compatible with Big Globe, which makes for a much different experience! As a result, the world is much more, well, more! Generated structures are much bigger, the biomes blend together well, and thanks to various compatibility mods, it integrates well with other mods included to make for a well-blended experience in my opinion. It also includes Distant Horizons to accomodate the much larger terrain, which also means dedicating at least 8GB of RAM is highly recommended. Suggestions are also welcome! This is my first experience with Big Globe, so anything that could improve this is welcomed advice! Feel free to send suggestions/requests to parrishpotato@zohomail.com and if I use the suggestion I will gladly mention that in the changelogs! I own none of the mods used in this modpack, and nearly all of the mods are used in their default configuration, so if you have any questions on how specific mods work, their documentation should help!
